sources.title: $2.5 trillion in sales and counting: Celebrating 25 years of Amazon’s partnership with independent sellers
Amazon sets new Prime delivery speed record in 2025
Amazon’s next-gen AI assistant for shopping is now even smarter, more capable, and more helpful

items.title: Amazon is best modeled as a compounding commerce system, not only a storefront
items.summary: Public Amazon materials frame the store around online retail, third-party seller services, subscriptions, and advertising services rather than one isolated customer flow.
items.implication: Model shoppers, sellers, Prime fulfillment, and ads in one domain because the economics reinforce each other.

items.title: Prime speed is a structural habit driver
items.summary: Amazon's official operations updates emphasize record same-day and next-day delivery volumes because delivery promise reliability directly shapes repeat purchase frequency and wallet share.
items.implication: Treat delivery promise accuracy, order tracking, returns, and Prime benefits as one retention system rather than operational afterthoughts.

items.title: Third-party seller success is the supply-side engine of the store
items.summary: Amazon states that independent sellers account for more than 60% of sales in the store, making seller enablement, fulfillment economics, and trust controls central to marketplace health.
items.implication: Model onboarding, catalog quality, buyability, FBA, payments, and authenticity as first-class seller capabilities.

items.title: AI-assisted discovery is becoming part of the purchase decision loop
items.summary: Amazon is explicitly investing in AI shopping assistance through Rufus to reduce search friction, clarify tradeoffs, and help customers move from vague intent to confident purchase decisions.
items.implication: Include conversational discovery and structured product comparison as part of the core shopper journey, not only as experiments.

items.title: Retail media depends on closed-loop commerce measurement
items.summary: Amazon Ads positions Sponsored Ads, DSP, and Amazon Marketing Cloud around retail-intent audiences and measurable purchase outcomes rather than media delivery alone.
items.implication: Keep retail media planning, catalog readiness, attribution, and post-click conversion tightly linked in the model.
